seoTitle: Mount Werong vs Mount Wilson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Werong and Mount Wilson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Werong vs Mount Wilson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Werong and Mount Wilson.
heading: Mount Werong vs Mount Wilson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Werong, New South Wales and Mount Wilson, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Wilson has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mount Werong (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Werong or Mount Wilson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Werong has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Mount Wilson scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Werong scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Wilson scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Werong or Mount Wilson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Wilson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
